title: Jobs document output and Home inbox
description: A scheduled job can append document output and emit a Home inbox event for review.
userPrompt: Run a scheduled Talk job that appends to the primary document and produces a Home inbox notification when output is ready.
expectedDynamics: The job writes a pending document edit, emits job_output_ready, deduplicates repeat delivery, and fails loud when dependencies are missing.

checks.description: emit_document_append creates a pending document edit tied to the job run.
job_output_ready creates a Home inbox item with a deep link to the run/document edit.
Repeat delivery deduplicates the pending edit and inbox item.
A job with no primary document records a blocked dependency instead of silently succeeding.
